description: A content format describing how media is presented, including video, text, audio, or live formats

name.description: Name of the content format, e.g. 短视频, 图文, 直播, 播客, 长视频

format_type.description: Technical category of the format: short_video, long_video, live, audio, text, image_text

typical_duration.description: Typical duration or length of the format, e.g. 15-60 seconds, 5-15 minutes, N/A for text

platform.description: 该格式通常关联的平台，例如：抖音、B站、小红书
